zh.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf是Peter Kumpf和Elisabeth Zeller的兒子，於大約1624年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。他和Catharina至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1644年在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登被列為judge and clergyman。他埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf是Peter Kumpf和Elisabeth Zeller的儿子，于大约1624年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。他和Catharina至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1644年在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登被列为judge and clergyman。他埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Kumpf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hermann, Kurt, Otto.
German: nickname for a short stout man, from Middle High German kumpf ‘(small) measure of grain, pouch (for a whetstone)’. Compare Kump .

variants.name: Kump
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Mathias, Alois, Gerhard, Traude.
German: metonymic occupational name for a bowl maker, from Middle Low German kump ‘(wooden) bowl’.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf was born about 1624, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse as the son of Peter Kumpf and Elisabeth Zeller. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Catharina. In 1644, his occupation is listed as judge and clergyman in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. He was buried in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse.

fr.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf est né environ 1624, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, fils de Peter Kumpf et Elisabeth Zeller. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Catharina. En 1644, sa profession de son indiquée est judge and clergyman à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ilenterré à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

de.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf wurde um 1624 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, als Sohn von Peter Kumpf und Elisabeth Zeller geboren. Er hatte mit Catharina mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1644 ist sein Beruf als judge and clergyman in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er wurde in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf è nato il circa 1624 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen come figlio di Peter Kumpf e Elisabeth Zeller. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Catharina. Nel 1644, la sua occupazione è indicata come judge and clergyman nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Fu sepolto a Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpfは約1624年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでPeter KumpfとElisabeth Zellerの息子として生まれた。彼はCatharinaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1644年，ドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンでの職業はjudge and clergymanと記録されている。彼はグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf(은)는 대략 1624년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Peter Kumpf(와)과 Elisabeth Zeller의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Catharina(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1644년, 그의 직업은 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 judge and clergyman이었다. 그는 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf nasceu aproximadamente 1624, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen filho de Peter Kumpf e Elisabeth Zeller. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Catharina. Em 1644, sua profissão aparece como judge and clergyman em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Ele foi sepultado em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ru.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf родился около 1624 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. Его родителей звали Peter Kumpf и Elisabeth Zeller. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Catharina. В 1644 году он работал по профессии judge and clergyman в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. Он был похоронен в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен.

sm.1644-1688: mai le 1644 e o'o I le 1688

es.lifeSummary: Peter Kumpf nació aproximadamente 1624, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen como hijo de Peter Kumpf y Elisabeth Zeller. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Catharina. En 1644, su ocupación registrada era judge and clergyman en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fue sepultado en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.
